creator: dennis@rootxs.nl
text:
Hello Edwin,

I am the maintainer, only changed email-address. Ans of course I approve
my own patch. :P

Thanks for your time.

Kind regards,

Dennis

> Maintainer of irc/ptlink-ircd,
>
> Please note that PR ports/100145 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/100145
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>


-- 
http://www.rootxs.nl

"We could change the world if god would give us the source code"
